services.title: Services
services.intro: I help organisations bring people, process, and technology together — building the systems that make work run smoothly.

offerings.title: Software & ERP Development
offerings.desc: Custom enterprise systems — HR, payroll, project workflow, and more — built around how your team actually works.

offerings.title: HR & IT Consulting
offerings.desc: Practical advice at the intersection of human resources and information technology: process design, systems selection, and digital transformation.

offerings.title: Saudi Local Content Advisory
offerings.desc: Measure your local content score and get a clear, practical roadmap to improve it — the thinking behind Mahalli Pro.

mahalli.title: Mahalli Pro
mahalli.tagline: Know your Saudi local content score — and how to raise it.
mahalli.intro: Mahalli Pro collects your company's data, calculates your local content percentage against the relevant criteria, and turns it into clear, practical recommendations.
points: Accurate scoring from your real procurement and payroll data.
Actionable recommendations — exactly where and how to improve.
Built for Saudi businesses, aligned with local content requirements.

about.title: Hello, I'm Harshath.
about.intro: I work at the intersection of HR and IT — bringing together people, process, and technology.
about.p1: I'm an HR and IT Manager based in Al Khobar, Saudi Arabia, with over 18 years of experience across information technology and people operations. My career began in IT engineering — building and maintaining networks, systems, and security infrastructure — and has grown into leading teams and managing both the technology and human sides of an organisation.
about.p2: Today I focus on keeping operations dependable: secure, reliable IT systems on one hand, and well-coordinated, well-supported people on the other. I care about practical solutions, systems people can rely on, and helping those around me do their best work.
about.p2a: The fastest way to reach me is by email at
